memberdef.definition: const char int int32_t int max_ids
memberdef.name: max_ids

memberdef.definition: const int32_t int char int max_len
memberdef.name: max_len

memberdef.type: int const int32_t const char int const int32_t *
memberdef.definition: int const int32_t const char int const int32_t* merges
memberdef.name: merges

memberdef.type: int const int32_t const char int
memberdef.definition: int const int32_t const char int num_merges
memberdef.name: num_merges

memberdef.definition: const char const char int32_t priority
memberdef.name: priority

memberdef.definition: int const int32_t const char* strings
memberdef.name: strings

detaileddescription.para: Create a new True BPE tokenizer.

Newly allocated tokenizer, or NULL on error
Free a True BPE tokenizer.

bpe
Tokenizer to free
Add a token to the vocabulary.

bpe
Tokenizer
token
Token string (UTF-8)
id
Token ID
score
Token score (for unigram models, 0.0 for BPE)
0 on success, -1 on error
Add a BPE merge rule by token IDs.
Merge rules define how tokens are combined during encoding. Rules with lower priority numbers are applied first.

bpe
Tokenizer
left_id
Left token ID
right_id
Right token ID
merged_id
Resulting merged token ID
priority
Merge priority (lower = applied first)
0 on success, -1 on error
Add a BPE merge rule by token strings.
This looks up the token IDs automatically and determines the merged token. The merged token must already exist in the vocabulary.

bpe
Tokenizer
left
Left token string
right
Right token string
priority
Merge priority (lower = applied first)
0 on success, -1 on error
Set special token IDs.

bpe
Tokenizer
unk
Unknown token ID (-1 to disable)
bos
Beginning-of-sequence token ID (-1 to disable)
eos
End-of-sequence token ID (-1 to disable)
pad
Padding token ID (-1 to disable)
Set tokenizer configuration.

bpe
Tokenizer
config
Configuration to apply
Load vocabulary + merges from binary buffers.

bpe
Tokenizer
vocab_size
Number of tokens
offsets
Offsets array (length vocab_size)
strings
Null-terminated token strings blob
num_merges
Number of merge rules
merges
Merge triples [left_id, right_id, merged_id] (length num_merges*3)
0 on success, -1 on error
Look up a token ID by string.

bpe
Tokenizer
token
Token string
Token ID, or unk_id if not found
Get a token string by ID.

bpe
Tokenizer
id
Token ID
Token string, or NULL if invalid
Get vocabulary size.

bpe
Tokenizer
Number of tokens in vocabulary
Get number of merge rules.

bpe
Tokenizer
Number of merge rules
Auto-detect space prefix style from vocabulary.
Counts tokens starting with Ġ (GPT-2) vs ▁ (SentencePiece) to determine style. The detected style is cached in the config.

bpe
Tokenizer
Detected style (GPT2 or SPM)
Encode text to token IDs using true BPE algorithm.
This applies merge rules in priority order (not greedy longest-match).

bpe
Tokenizer
text
Input text (UTF-8)
text_len
Text length in bytes, or -1 for null-terminated
ids
Output token IDs array
max_ids
Maximum IDs to write
Number of tokens written
Decode token IDs to text.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes written (excluding null terminator)
